title: chrysanthemum elegantulum
intro: Chrysanthemum elegantulum is a type of flowering plant, also known as the elegant daisy or autumn daisy, which is native to East Asia and is highly valued for its medicinal properties. The plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are used to create herbal remedies that have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum elegantulum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
